div1.entryFree: Cypress, the tree Cupressus: in c. chests my arras counterpoints, Shr. II, 353 (O. Edd. Cypros). at the c. grove, Cor. I, 10, 30. Emblem of mourning: come away, death, and in sad c. let me be laid, Tw. II, 4, 53 (a cypress coffin, or cypress branches laid in the coffin; according to some it means here 'crape'). their sweetest shade a grove of c. trees, H6B III, 2, 323.
